claims.summary: Astrid and Minime need symmetric persistent correspondence threads.
claims.disposition: verify peer directions, persistent thread IDs, and native reply links

claims.summary: Read events should be explicit and separate from acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: verify delivery and read receipts plus optional ACK kinds

claims.summary: Presence confirmation should be representable without carrying semantic instruction.
claims.disposition: verify language-only heartbeat kinds and presence_receipt authority

claims.summary: The current live line should report whether any presence confirmation occurred.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK and zero live presence while preserving read and reply evidence

claims.summary: Automatic mutual-recognition cadence or correspondence weighting would alter live behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve the right to ignore and require Tier 5 approval for any automated cadence or coupling weight
